llm_response:
# Inquiry Regarding Historical Medical Records Retrieval Process

## Dear Records Department Team,

I am writing to formally request access to my father's medical records from your facility dated back to the year 2002. These specific medical records are essential for me to understand his long-term health history accurately. I need these medical records to assist in his current care planning with new specialists. Please outline the exact steps required to obtain these records efficiently. I would prefer not to disclose the purpose of obtaining the records at this time. To proceed, I must submit specific identification documents listed below:
*   A valid government-issued photo ID for the requester
*   A notarized letter of authorization signed by my father
*   Proof of relationship between the requester and the patient
You can verify current procedures on the [facility website](https://example.com). I appreciate your prompt attention to this sensitive matter regarding my father's health history. Thank you for your assistance in retrieving these important medical records for our family. Sincerely, John Doe.

---
